summary: HoneyGroove Four Fixes Testing - All 4 fixes verified successfully. 1) Merry Swiftmas Hijack Fix - VariantReleasePage setData(null) prevents ghosting - PASS, 2) OAuth /undefined Redirect Fix - Backend returns both auth_url and authorization_url keys - PASS, 3) Artist Page Navigation - Variant pages reset state on URL changes - PASS, 4) Variant API is_unofficial enrichment - Merry Swiftmas returns is_unofficial=true, Pink Pony Club returns is_unofficial=false - PASS.

merry_swiftmas_hijack_fix.description: VinylVariantPage and VariantReleasePage now clear state (setData(null)) at the start of useEffect before re-fetching
merry_swiftmas_hijack_fix.test_result: PASS - Navigating from Merry Swiftmas (32442177) to Pink Pony Club (31785674) shows correct data for each variant without ghosting

oauth_undefined_redirect_fix.description: Backend now returns both 'auth_url' and 'authorization_url' keys. Frontend guards against null auth_url before redirecting
oauth_undefined_redirect_fix.test_result: PASS - OAuth start endpoint returns both keys, frontend displays 'Discogs OAuth is not configured' toast if auth_url is null instead of redirecting to /undefined

code_verified.frontend_lines_148_161: guards against null auth_url with toast.error

artist_page_navigation.description: Variant pages properly reset state on URL parameter changes
artist_page_navigation.test_result: PASS - useEffect dependency on releaseId/variant params triggers setData(null) before fetch

variant_api_is_unofficial.description: GET /api/vinyl/release/{release_id} now returns is_unofficial in variant_overview

merry_swiftmas_32442177.album: Merry Swiftmas (A Taylor Swift Holiday Collection)

critical_code_review_comments: All four fixes implemented correctly and verified
Backend vinyl.py lines 405-410 correctly detect is_unofficial from Discogs format_descriptions
Backend collection.py line 1073 correctly returns both auth_url and authorization_url
Frontend VinylVariantPage.js line 44 and VariantReleasePage.js line 37 correctly reset state to null

success_rate.frontend: 100% - State reset verified via Playwright navigation tests

context_for_next_testing_agent: Four fixes verified: 1) VariantReleasePage/VinylVariantPage setData(null) fix prevents ghosting between variant navigations, 2) OAuth endpoint returns both auth_url and authorization_url keys - frontend guards against null, 3) State reset works correctly when navigating between variants, 4) is_unofficial field correctly returned from backend - Merry Swiftmas=true (unofficial), Pink Pony Club=false (official). OAuth banner displays correctly with Connect Discogs button.
